rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ahh, Lin-chan's cooking
is always so delicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0002
rows.name: I'm glad! But I'm sorry too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0003
rows.name:
If I'd known the two of you were
coming, I would have made much more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0004
rows.name: Exactly, mo! My portion got smaller, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0006
rows.name:
That Gwin, short as he is, eats three times
as much as a normal person. What a pain.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0007
rows.name: The short part was uncalled for![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Besides, Lieutenant Iriina, you
ate more than I did, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs05030100_MSG0009
rows.name:
So, you all[ST:wide ]― Didn't you
have some business here?[ST:wait ]
